calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment. The court finds that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. The motion is granted and the court will sign the consent judgment attached as Exhibit A to the Smith Declaration.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
